positive: A stylized, high-contrast graphic illustration of a whimsical celestial animal blend, featuring a stylized griffin-unicorn hybrid with iridescent feather accents, surrounded by orbiting crescent moons, delicate constellations, and stylized nebula dust clouds. The composition should be centered and visually balanced, using deep indigo blues, ethereal violets, shimmering golds, and pops of cosmic turquoise. The style should be modern, neo-tribal, and clean, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Strong black outlines should define the silhouette, ensuring excellent print clarity. Minimal shading, maximum graphic impact. Vector art quality, maximal detail, highly saturated colors, centered composition.
